task_description: Transform the game from a linear 20-wave gauntlet into a non-linear dungeon hub with branching sub-areas. Implement world map with 4 areas (Goblin Warrens, Bone Cathedral, Plague Gardens, Lich's Throne) around a central hub (Danjin's Core). Each area has encounters, events, bosses, and key rewards. Preserve existing wave-based combat as Classic Mode. Add story progression, multiple endings, new enemies, and full save/load support.

verification.summary: Clean build (./gradlew clean classes) passes. No test framework configured for this project. All 13 new files created, 8+ existing files modified. Story mode and classic mode both wired correctly.
